title: Create: Domenik's Mod
description: this mod adds small things to the Create mod.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2be9ed0fcc5a20a25469f1c3cae177fd64ca8423.png)

**IF THERE IS ANY BUG PLEASE LET ME KNOW ON MY [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/mqdMgwRw3H)**

## Description:

This mod adds small things like the blasting sail or the washing sail which smelt or washed items. you need the Create mod for this mod.


# Content:

- Some new Blocks and Items
- some new recipes


**NOTE: Use JEI for recipes**

**NOTE2: PLEASE USE CREATE 6.0.7 AND ABOVE BECAUSE OF JEI ISSUES**
